view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for booking flexibility is satisfied as evidenced by the booking details.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for booking flexibility is satisfied as evidenced by the booking details.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of booking flexibility with the evidence provided. The linked use case describes a scenario where a patient can book an appointment for 'any time Tuesday' or 'this week', and the evidence shows that bookings were made with the necessary flexibility. Specifically, the booking details confirm that the system allows for appointments to be assigned based on availability, which aligns with the requirement of 'any time Tuesday' or 'this week' booking.
